title: Workdoc dynamic value automatic update?
excerpt: Hi - I’m new to Monday.com and I’m trying to build out a workdoc that is automatically synced with a board. Right now I have linked everything through dynamic values, but in order for the dynamic values to update I have …

posts.author: c.einarsen (Carson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - I’m new to Monday.com and I’m trying to build out a workdoc that is automatically synced with a board. Right now I have linked everything through dynamic values, but in order for the dynamic values to update I have to refresh the page. Is this an error on my end or is that just how dynamic values work and there isn’t any automatic updates like with the regular boards? Any assistance would be great - I’d just like these docs to remain up to date without having to reload the page

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
G’Day @c.einarsen

Welcome to the community!

Not an error on your part. You’re correct, and you’ll need to refresh the doc to work with what’s current. You could repost in the ‘Feature Requests’ category but might be a while before they consider that one a priority.

We find it helpful that the top of the page gives you a last updated date and time

posts.author: c.einarsen (Carson)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you - and that’s a really good point that the last update date and time are at the top!!!
